value.found_quote: Distributed tracing exports spans that link each user prompt to the API requests and tool executions it triggers, so you can view a full request as a single trace in your tracing backend.
value.rationale: The page describes a distributed tracing (beta) feature where spans link each user prompt to the API requests and tool executions it triggers. However, the claim's specific framing — "Read agent traces" as a named offering where "each agent loop step becomes an inspectable span" — is not asserted on the page. The page describes spans for user prompts, API requests, and tool executions, but does not use the phrase "agent loop step" nor name a feature called "Read agent traces." The claim's specific named offering is not substantiated, though a related general tracing capability exists.
